response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio perfectly matches the reference song lyrics for "Airman ga Taosenai" and "Melodies of Life" provided in the reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used the reference lyrics for transcription and disambiguation, and manually transcribed the on-screen song title cards. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed exactly to the vocal onset of each phrase. Instrumental segments were left silent except for the display of prominent on-screen song titles. Ellipses were used to bridge grammatically continuous sentences split across subtitle blocks to maintain semantic flow.

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try,

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せないよ
あの竜巻何回やっても避けれない
subtitles.english: I can't avoid that tornado no matter how many times I try.

subtitles.original: うしろに回って撃ち続けても
subtitles.english: Even if I go behind him and keep shooting,

subtitles.original: いずれは風に飛ばされる
subtitles.english: I'll eventually get blown away by the wind.

subtitles.original: タイム連打も試してみたけど
subtitles.english: I tried rapid-firing the pause button too,

subtitles.original: 竜巻相手じゃ意味が無い
subtitles.english: But it's meaningless against the tornado!

subtitles.original: だから次は絶対勝つために
subtitles.english: So, to make sure I win next time,

subtitles.original: 僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく
subtitles.english: I'll save my E-tank until the very end.

subtitles.original: あてもなく 彷徨っていた
手がかりもなく探し続けた
あなたがくれた思い出を
subtitles.english: Turning the memories you gave me...
...into a song that heals my heart.
